full_text: I just use cloud code to create an automation which automatically fetches videos from your favorite YouTube channels, rewrite them into Po magazine articles and deliver them as an ePub ebook to your inbox every week The inspiration came from my previous project where I turned the acquired podcast into an actual physical book which I printed out so many of you guys ask me for the book so I thought why not let anyone create your favorite ebook with your favorite podcast so you can have your own personalized digital magazine first let me.What the results look like every week you're gonna get this email newsletter that includes the remixed articles from your favorite YouTube channel' latest videos For example, this article is rewritten based on the latent space podcast and the writing style is kind of like a very well written long for a magazine article it read like a story so it's actually engaging it's not just the raw transcript This current issue contains seven videos since it's super long the attachment of the email also includes the ep file which you can easily load into any.Read so you get both the newsletter and the ebook This is how it looks like on my phone so you get the email newsletter and in the attachment you get this ePub file where you can click share and then use any ebook app such as books This will open up the ebook in your ebook reader is very nicely formatted even comes with chapters for different YouTube videos I also got Cla to build me a simple web interface where I can configure the digest like I can click this button to trigger sending a newsletter at any time.Here I can manage the channels I want to include in the newsletter here I can easily edit the prompt for the remixing the writing here I can view the past newsletter archives here I can manage the automation schedule like when to send the newsletter the automation is run from my own Mac I think running locally is a lot easier because the cloud providers often encounter API limits when trying to access the YouTube transcripts so I just bookmark this web page on my browser so that I can access it easily and triggered.And whenever I want, this automation will only work if my Mac is active, which is pretty much all the time I turn the workflow into a cloud skill called YouTube 2 ebook, which you can check in the link below is very simple to set up you don't need to write any code yourself you just need to get a couple API keys from these websites.
